Hi,

Thanks for sending over the proposal — appreciate the detailed breakdown and the enterprise pricing offer.

For the rest of this quarter we're committed to our current vendor through Q3, so we're not in a position to evaluate alternatives right now. That said, I'd like to keep the door open for a Q4 conversation. Would you be open to a follow-up in early September once we're closer to renewal?

Thanks for understanding,
Sam
